title: NoteDecryptor trait: correct IVK injection seam — never expose real key until crate is unblocked
description: Why this choice is correct: zcash_primitives is blocked (core2 yanked) and the scanner still needed to ship. Defining NoteDecryptor as a trait with NullDecryptor as the placeholder means (a) the scanner infrastructure is testable now, (b) the IVK plugs in without changing the scanner's public interface, (c) the trait bound is Send so it works in spawn_scanner without change. A future contributor might suggest 'just skip note decryption for now' (i.e. no trait, no scanner) — wrong, because you lose the per-block tip advance and crash recovery logic. Another suggestion might be 'just unwrap the zcash_primitives dep' — blocked by core2. The trait design is the right call.
close_reason: Decision record — no code change required; rationale preserved in codebase
